## Design language: MIZAN (DL-13)

**Balance creates clarity.** Islamic tradition: Balance and harmony.

Status: candidate. Occasions: cultural projects, personal-brand material, book promotion, artisan commerce.

### Design laws

- Harmony before decoration
- Warm restrained palette
- Elegant proportion
- Geometry with purpose
- White space is active

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | story-first |
| density | executive |
| annotation_policy | minimal |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | evidence-only |
| reading_time | minute |
| charts_per_page | 1 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#F7EFE3` |
| panel | `#F1E5D3` |
| ink | `#31261D` |
| body | `#4E4237` |
| hairline | `#DCCFB6` |
| gridline | `#E5D9C2` |
| primary | `#C4572E` |
| muted | `#C9BBA4` |
| positive | `#3D5A46` |
| negative | `#7A3B1E` |
| indigo | `#31486E` |

### Fonts

- display: 'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif, weight 600
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
